---
title: "Browse by Tag"
comments: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "../personal/20*.qmd"
    - "../biblical/20*.qmd"
    - "../writing/20*.qmd"
    - "../data-nerd/20*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, date, categories]
---

Use the tag browser below to filter posts across every writing section. This browser treats each post's `categories` as the site's clickable tags, so older and newer content stay in one archive.

::: {.section-panel .tag-browser-panel}
## Filter Posts

Pick a tag to narrow the archive, or use **All Posts** to clear the filter.

<div class="tag-browser" data-all-tags-browser></div>
:::
